terms.definition: Childhood - the period of time when a person is a child. It refers to the early years of life filled with play, learning, and innocence.
terms.exampleUsage: पापा का बचपन बहुत मज़ेदार था। (Papa's childhood was very fun.)

terms.definition: Mischief or prank - a playful, naughty act done for fun without meaning to harm anyone. Children often do shararat while playing.
terms.exampleUsage: पापा बचपन में बहुत शरारत करते थे। (Papa used to do a lot of mischief in his childhood.)

terms.definition: Memory or remembrance - something from the past that is stored in the mind. Yaad can also mean 'to remember'.
terms.exampleUsage: मुझे बचपन की यह याद अभी भी है। (I still have this memory from childhood.)

terms.definition: Mischievous or naughty - an adjective used to describe someone who loves to play pranks and do fun, playful things.
terms.exampleUsage: पापा बहुत शरारती बच्चे थे। (Papa was a very mischievous child.)

terms.definition: Naughty or playful - another word for mischievous, often used lovingly for children who are full of energy and pranks.
terms.exampleUsage: वह बहुत नटखट बच्चा है। (He is a very naughty child.)

terms.definition: A story - a narrative that tells about events, characters, and experiences. Stories can be real or imaginary and are used to teach, entertain, or share memories.
terms.exampleUsage: पापा ने अपने बचपन की कहानी सुनाई। (Papa told the story of his childhood.)

terms.definition: Fun or frolic - the state of being playful, cheerful, and enjoying oneself. It describes carefree enjoyment.
terms.exampleUsage: बच्चे बारिश में मस्ती कर रहे थे। (The children were having fun in the rain.)

terms.definition: To scold - when an elder tells off a child for doing something wrong, usually in a stern voice. Parents daant children to teach them right from wrong.
terms.exampleUsage: शरारत करने पर दादी ने पापा को डाँटा। (Grandmother scolded Papa for being naughty.)

terms.definition: Childhood memories - the collection of experiences and moments from one's early years that are remembered fondly.
terms.exampleUsage: बचपन की यादें हमेशा दिल में रहती हैं। (Childhood memories always remain in the heart.)

terms.definition: To climb a tree - a common childhood activity where children climb up trees for fun, to pick fruits, or as an adventure.
terms.exampleUsage: पापा बचपन में पेड़ पर चढ़ा करते थे। (Papa used to climb trees in his childhood.)
